message:
fix(raptorq): use serde_json serialization for string fields in regression_log_lines

The regression_log_lines formatter used raw format! interpolation for
string fields (schema_version, replay_ref, metric, regime_state,
verdict), which meant any backslash, double-quote, or newline character
in those values would produce malformed JSON that downstream parsers
would reject. All string fields now go through serde_json::to_string
which handles escaping correctly. A new regression test injects these
characters and round-trips the output through serde_json::from_str to
verify structural validity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
